title: Section 32
content: The property of an intestate devolves upon the wife or husband, or upon those who are of the kindred of the deceased, in the order and according to the rules hereinafter contained in this Chapter. 1*****
footnote: 1. The Explanation omitted by Act 26 of 2002, s. 2 (w.e.f. 27-5-2002).
